title: Landlords Research
body: "In 2023, HMRC commissioned research with landlords to better understand their experience of owning property. A representative sample of 1,243 landlords were surveyed, and 20 follow-up qualitative in-depth interviews were carried out.  The research explored:   investment behaviour among landlords use of agents and accounting systems the geographical distribution of landlords’ properties the perceived barriers to filing correct tax returns among landlords   "

taxons.title: Being a landlord and renting out a room
